title: Front Office Manager - Accor India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Accor India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Accor India! We are hiring a Front Office Manager for our Faridabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Accor India:
Accor India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Accor India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
